AUTOMATON-BOTTLED_CODE.title: Bottled Code
AUTOMATON-BOTTLED_CODE.description: Upon pickup, choose a card with Encode. Start each combat with this card Encoded.
AUTOMATON-BOTTLED_CODE.flavor: Actually, I have code for that exact thing...
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_CORE.title: Bronze Core
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_CORE.description: The first time you create a Function each combat, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
AUTOMATON-CABLE_SPOOL.title: Cable Spool
AUTOMATON-CABLE_SPOOL.description: Encode a copy of the first Encodable card you play each combat.
AUTOMATON-DONUS_WASHERS.title: Donu's Washers
AUTOMATON-DONUS_WASHERS.description: At the start of combat, gain @AuE @AuE and add 1 {{C|Void}} into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-DONUS_WASHERS.flavor: It is rather clear why Donu collects these.
AUTOMATON-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.title: Electromagnetic Coil
AUTOMATON-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.descripti: Functions are now made up of 4 cards.
AUTOMATON-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.flavor: An inefficient but entertaining power source.
AUTOMATON-FROST_PRIMER.title: Frost Primer
AUTOMATON-FROST_PRIMER.description: All Functions you create gain Retain.
AUTOMATON-FROST_PRIMER.flavor: 22 ounces of the chemical compound Ar22, shelf life: 22 years. Best stored in a mahogany fridge.
AUTOMATON-MAKESHIFT_BATTERY.title: Makeshift Battery
AUTOMATON-MAKESHIFT_BATTERY.description: Gain @AuE and add a {{C|Slimed}} into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] at the start of your turn.
AUTOMATON-MALLET.title: Mallet
AUTOMATON-MALLET.description: At the start of each combat, add 2 copies of {{C|Fine Tuning|Fine Tuning+}} to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-MALLET.flavor: That's it! I'm gettin me mallet!
AUTOMATON-PLATINUM_CORE.title: Platinum Core
AUTOMATON-PLATINUM_CORE.description: The first 3 Functions you create each combat cost 0 until played.
AUTOMATON-PROTECTIVE_GOGGLES.title: Protective Goggles
AUTOMATON-PROTECTIVE_GOGGLES.description: If you end your turn with no Encoded cards, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold].
AUTOMATON-SILVER_BULLET.title: Silver Bullet
AUTOMATON-SILVER_BULLET.description: At the start of each combat, add a copy of {{C|Piercing Shot}} to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
